creator: pdemon@gmail.com
text:
Hi Yuri,

Any update?

Sorry to keep pestering you, however, I have a dependent patch for a downstream application (pfSense) and I'm hoping to get my patch included before their next release.

Additionally, I'd like to get this wrapped up while it's still somewhat fresh in my mind.

Here's a link to the dependent patch if you're interested: https://github.com/pfsense/pfsense/pull/3908

Thanks again,
Phil
